t_ch: 诸位，尽力剿灭这些幻花，由我来击破她的肉身。
t_en: All of you — focus on destroying the phantom flowers — I'll go for the body.

t_ch: 真是大言不惭，妄想破坏这建木所生的贵体。
t_en: So much bark with so little bite — your attacks are futile.

t_ch: 以幻胧看来，各位现在像蝼蚁般渺小呢。
t_en: Hahaha... This body was born of the Arbor. You are but ants.

t_ch: 好、好大的风！
t_en: That's some strong wind!

t_ch: 小心，三月！
t_en: March, careful!

t_ch: 试试挣脱这道囚笼吧。
t_en: Try untangling yourselves from this.

t_ch: 区区藤萝，一剑即可斩断。
t_en: The weeds in my garden give me more grief.

t_ch: 逞强。
t_en: Your arrogance betrays you.

t_ch: 要碾碎蝼蚁，没有比坠下一颗星星更合适的了。
t_en: Crushing an ant with the weight of a star — how indulgent.

t_ch: 宇宙的一切都将以「毁灭」作结，「丰饶」与「巡猎」也不例外…
t_en: The universe will end in destruction, and with it the Abundance and The Hunt will disappear...

t_ch: 仙舟的将军，你那微不足道的力量，能否撑过这场浩劫？
t_en: General of the Xianzhou, can your feeble strength survive this calamity?

t_ch: 将军！
t_en: General!

t_ch: 丹恒…接下来，交给你了。
t_en: Dan Heng... you take it from here.

t_ch: 以为自己胜券在握了吗，幻胧？
t_en: Did you think it was over, Phantylia?

t_ch: 喔？是「不朽」的龙裔么？
t_en: Oh? A Scion of Permanence?

t_ch: 你终于前来履行守望建木的职责了？
t_en: Have you finally remembered your duty of watching over the Arbor?

t_ch: 我会牵制住他，丹恒，扫清她所造的污秽！
t_en: I'll restrict her movements — Dan Heng, clear her creations!

t_ch: 我正有此意！
t_en: Way ahead of you!

t_ch: 破绽百出。
t_en: Not as strong as you look.

t_ch: 荡涤妖邪！
t_en: Get back!

t_ch: 幻胧，这一击如何？！
t_en: Had enough, Phantylia!?

t_ch: 霄龙现影，破！
t_en: Celestial dragon... Break!

t_ch: 幻胧，虽然你将我们视如蝼蚁…
t_en: Are we still ants to you, Phantylia?

t_ch: 但能与蝼蚁打得如此有来有回，你也可称得上绝灭大君之中头一个了。
t_en: So much effort to crush us, and met with so little success... I wonder what the other Ravagers would think.

t_ch: 将军的意思是想再见见其他几位？只怕…你们没有机会了。
t_en: It's almost as if you can't wait to be acquainted with them... I'm afraid you won't have the chance.

t_ch: 这家伙…要动真格了！
t_en: I think she's about to get serious!

t_ch: 接下来，要请各位欣赏这死前最后的盛景。
t_en: Before your demise, I invite you to enjoy one last spectacle.

t_ch: 这般不新鲜的把戏，不必再用了吧！
t_en: Out of ideas, Phantylia?

t_ch: 不碍事，蝼蚁濒死的反扑，显得分外凄丽…
t_en: Forgive my indulgence. Your struggle in the face of certain death is... touching.

t_ch: 下一出戏目里，我要将各位炮制成虚卒。
t_en: For my next trick, I shall turn each of you into my Voidrangers.

t_ch: 让「毁灭」的力量侵蚀各位的血肉，将你们铸成纳努克大人的棋子！
t_en: The power of the Destruction will eat away at your flesh and transform you into pawns of the great Nanook!

t_ch: 决定了，就从这傲慢不可一世的仙舟将军开始吧…！
t_en: Let's start with this arrogant Xianzhou general...

t_ch: 难怪药王秘传自信高人一等…这建木仙迹确有化生再造的力量。
t_en: Now I see why the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus hold themselves in such high regard... the Arbor's traces really do possess the power of metamorphosis and resurrection.

t_ch: 各位，务必小心。
t_en: All of you, ready yourselves.

t_ch: 丹恒，我的后背，就拜托你了。
t_en: Dan Heng, guard my back. I'm counting on you.

t_ch: 我明白。
t_en: Understood.

t_ch: 「不夜侯」…那是咱们刚抵达时经过的港口茶馆的名字吧？
t_en: The Sleepless Earl... Was that the name of that teahouse at the port when we first got into town?

t_ch: 把停云小姐的礼物送到了对的人手里，心中有种释然的感觉。
t_en: *sigh* It feels nice to get Tingyun's gifts to the right people.

t_ch: 剩下的礼物，该送去哪儿呢……？
t_en: But what about the rest...?

t_ch: 停云小姐物品里的那柄菜刀，还有尚滋味…我总记得，在长乐天听过这个店招的名字呀？
t_en: The kitchen knife and Spices Supreme... I think I heard about that store before — over in Exalting Sanctum.

t_ch: 要找店铺，也许该问问罗浮本地人。
t_en: If we want to find it, maybe we should ask some Luofu locals.

t_ch: 「尚滋味」…看这招牌，就在这边！
t_en: Spices Supreme... Check out that sign. Here it is!

t_ch: 关于这把弓，我想我知道停云小姐想把它送给谁了。
t_en: About that bow — I think I know who Miss Tingyun intended to gift it to.

t_ch: 岩明先生说了，接渡使返乡时会带礼物送给信赖的同僚…
t_en: Mister Yanming said an Amicassador will return with a gift for a trusted colleague...

t_ch: 停云最信赖的人，只有驭空大人了吧？
t_en: The person who Tingyun trusts the most is Madam Yukong, right?

t_ch: 礼物？他终于良心发现，要补偿咱们这一路的辛苦了吗？
t_en: Two gifts? Has his conscience finally gotten the better of him? Is he going to make up for all our hard work along the way?

t_ch: 停云小姐留下的东西总算有了各自的去处。
t_en: The things Miss Tingyun left behind have finally found their homes.

t_ch: 也是时候返回迴星港，去见驭空大人了。
t_en: It's time to go back to Stargazer Navalia and see Madam Yukong.

t_ch: 外客初来乍到，逛的都是星槎海的宣夜大街。那儿名声在外，热闹是热闹，但要说好吃的好玩的地方哪儿多，还得去金人巷。我给你在地图上标好了。
t_en: Tourists fresh off the starskiff always head to Starwatcher Avenue in Starskiff Haven — it's one of those bustling tourist streets... But, if you want the real deal on local snacks, you've gotta get to Aurum Alley. I've marked it out for you on your map.

t_ch: 与此同时，在幽囚狱中……
t_en: Meanwhile, in The Shackling Prison...

t_ch: 一段时间后，你们为了探听景元的状况来到神策府……
t_en: Some time later, you arrive at the Seat of Divine Foresight to check on Jing Yuan...

t_ch: 还要请各位稍等，太卜大人去去就来。
t_en: Can you wait a little moment? The master diviner will be here soon.

t_ch: 如今她暂代将军职责，在与你们见面前，得对外布告情况，稳定人心。这便是成为将军的第一个考验了，希望这位大人能早些习惯。
t_en: She's temporarily taken on the general's responsibilities. Before meeting you, she must make the current situation known and fortify public spirit. This is her first real test as a general — I hope she can get used to things quickly.

t_ch: …我怕是习惯不了。
t_en: ...I don't think I can ever get used to this.

t_ch: 能在这儿见到各位真好。
t_en: *sigh* It's a pleasure to see you all here today.

t_ch: 统计伤亡损失，遣人追剿药王残党，向六御说明战况…怪不得景元说「坐这把交椅，如坐刀山」。
t_en: Collating casualties and losses, dispatching forces to round up the remnants of the Disciples, submitting battle reports to the Six Charioteers... Now I know what Jing Yuan meant when he said "the highest throne faces the strongest winds."

t_ch: 但你很享受吧？
t_en: But you're enjoying yourself, right?

t_ch: 将军的位子关系重大，谈何享受？只可说是适应吧，哼哼……
t_en: Generalship is no trifling matter — how could I be "enjoying myself?" All I can do is get used to it, hmph...

t_ch: （我看她就是很享受……）
t_en: (I think she's enjoying herself...)

t_ch: 我可替你分忧。
t_en: Share your troubles with me.

t_ch: 将军的位子关系重大，这是我应尽的责任，哼哼……
t_en: Generalship is no trifling matter — it is a duty one must bear.

t_ch: （我看她其实很享受……）
t_en: (I think she actually really enjoys it...)

t_ch: 太卜特地请我们来此，不是为了哀叹的吧？
t_en: Master Diviner, have you summoned us here just to sigh and complain?

t_ch: 当然不是！我既暂代将军一职，自然要以罗浮官方的身份感谢诸位仗义援手。如今事情告一段落，该是开诚布公回馈各位的时候了。
t_en: Of course not! On the contrary, I am eager to thank you all in my official capacity as acting general of the Luofu. Now that things have drawn to a conclusion, it is time to reward you.

t_ch: 哇哦！将军许诺的好处这就来了吗来了吗来了吗？
t_en: Oooo! All those benefits that the general promised — they're finally here! Yippee!

t_ch: 不错，星穹列车为罗浮出生入死，赤诚可鉴。经六御共商，自即日起，诸位便是罗浮的誓助盟友。在罗浮疆域之上，诸位受到视同联盟使节的最高规格优待。
t_en: Yes, the Astral Express has braved great evil for the Luofu. Your devotion is evident. After discussions with the Six Charioteers, you are henceforth sworn allies of the Luofu. Within the Luofu's jurisdiction, you are to be treated with the highest standard of diplomatic protocol.

t_ch: 我谨代表星穹列车感谢太卜。
t_en: On behalf of the Astral Express, I would like to thank you, Master Diviner.

t_ch: 哇，虽然什么实际的都没给，但听上去还挺酷的……
t_en: Wow, nothing tangible then, but at least it sounds pretty cool...

t_ch: 感谢的话完了，我还有一事要和各位参详。请到这边来。
t_en: Now that thanks have been expressed, I still have something to discuss with you. Please, this way.

t_ch: 不是吧你？刚感谢完，不会就要给我们派任务了吧……
t_en: ...Seriously? Thanking us like that, and then immediately sending us on another mission?

t_ch: 任务谈不上。只是星核降灾、「药王秘传」作乱、「建木」重生，乃至反物质军团渗透罗浮…这一切始末详略，我须向联盟高层具呈公文，以备调查。
t_en: It's not a mission. The Stellaron crisis, the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus rebellion, the Arbor's resurrection, not to mention the Antimatter Legion infiltrating the Luofu... All of these incidents need reporting at the highest level for investigation.

t_ch: 但我身处其中，或多或少受到外力牵引，所知偏颇。故而请各位与我一同梳理脉络，分晓其中的诸多细节。
t_en: ...It's just that, having been in the middle of everything, I'm struggling to keep an accurate perspective. I would appreciate if you could go through it all with me, so that I can reacquaint myself with the finer detail.

t_ch: 那么，该从哪儿聊起呢？
t_en: So, where should we begin?

t_ch: 先说幻胧…
t_en: Let's discuss Phantylia first...

t_ch: 现在看来，幻胧正是一切的主使；在仙舟历史上，反物质军团也曾与联盟有过交战，故而我们始终警惕着军团兵力的动向。
t_en: It appears that Phantylia was the mastermind behind it all. The Xianzhou warred with the Antimatter Legion in the past, and ever since we have kept a watchful eye on their movements.

t_ch: 可谁也料不到，他们的进攻会以某种更隐秘的方式进行。绝灭大君伪装潜入，策动阴谋，将星核交给药王秘传，引发叛乱，想诱使罗浮自灭。
t_en: Few could have foreseen the insidious tactics employed in the execution of their assaults. The Lord Ravager slithered in unnoticed, clandestinely plotting and machinating, and surreptitiously bestowed a Stellaron upon the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus. This heinous act instigated an uprising aimed at luring the Luofu into a perilous trap of self-destruction.

t_ch: 对军团的危险程度，我们显然应该再度评估了。
t_en: The present danger posed by the Legion clearly demands a re-evaluation. We should proceed cautiously.

t_ch: 说说药王秘传…
t_en: Let's talk about the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus...

t_ch: 自从「建木」在数千年前被帝弓司命斫断，「丰饶」被贬为禁忌。原本掌握所谓「仙道」的丹鼎司就此一蹶不振，成了聊胜于无的司部。
t_en: When the Ambrosial Arbor was severed by the Reignbow Arbiter thousands of years ago, the Abundance became a taboo. Those within the Alchemy Commission — the original masters of the so-called "way of immortality" — were ruined at a stroke. The commission became a shadow of its former self.

t_ch: 想来从那一刻起，「药王秘传」作乱的种子便已埋下了…他们中有人不惜与虎谋皮，向反物质军团求取了一颗星核，试图令{RUBY_B#建木}丰饶仙迹{RUBY_E#}重生。
t_en: Presumably, from that moment on, the seeds of discord for the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus had already been planted... Some of them were willing to work with the enemy, acquiring a Stellaron from the Antimatter Legion to try and revive {RUBY_B#Ambrosial Arbor}the Abundance{RUBY_E#}.

t_ch: 哼…他们确实成功了，但幻胧的目的又岂是为了帮他们实现愿望？这些叛徒出卖仙舟，结果却成了绝灭大君实施计划的祭品。
t_en: Hmm... They succeeded alright, but why would Phantylia's objective be to realize their wishes? Those traitors gained nothing — they betrayed the Xianzhou only to become sacrificial offerings in the Lord Ravager's grand scheme.

t_ch: 说说星核猎手…
t_en: Let's discuss the Stellaron Hunters...

t_ch: 关于星核猎手，我们知道的一样少。但在穷观阵里，我看见了卡芙卡从{RUBY_B#艾利欧}「命运的奴隶」{RUBY_E#}那里领受到的预言。艾利欧预见了罗浮的种种可能……
t_en: The Stellaron Hunters? We know just as little. But in the Matrix of Prescience, I saw a prophecy that Kafka received from {RUBY_B#Elio}Destiny's Slave{RUBY_E#}. Elio foresaw all manner of possibilities for the Luofu...

t_ch: 依照卡芙卡所知的信息，这可能性尽管被艾利欧掌控，但确实是对罗浮最有利的未来。星核猎手们自投罗网，又为仙舟引来了盟友…也就是你们。虽有私心，结果仍是好意。
t_en: Based on what Kafka knows, and despite everything being under the control of Elio, that prophecy is indeed the most beneficial future for the Luofu. The Stellaron Hunters walked right into our trap, and even gifted allies — in the form of yourselves — to the Xianzhou... That might sound self-interested, but I hope the feeling is mutual.

t_ch: 现在那个未来已经成真——仙舟发现了军团的企图，并且在各位的帮助下令幻胧铩羽而归。
t_en: Now that future has come true, the Xianzhou has discovered the Legion's intentions, and with everyone's help, has imposed a crushing defeat on Phantylia.

t_ch: 我们知道的情报很多了…
t_en: I think we already have the gist...

t_ch: 已知的信息虽然足够，逻辑也算得合理，但仍有一些细枝末节的碎处。
t_en: That we may, but as logical as things might seem, there are still many details about which we're uncertain.

t_ch: 譬如星核如何被带上仙舟？又由谁送进了鳞渊境？还有多少药王秘传的残党尚未被清剿？这些全都无从知晓。但我们已尽力了。
t_en: For example, how was the Stellaron brought onto the Xianzhou? And who sent it on to Scalegorge Waterscape? How many Disciples of Sanctus Medicus still remain at large? All of this is a mystery. Thus far, we've done our best.

t_ch: 提交联盟的文书报告，本座心里已有计较。关于各位的部分亦不会少，但为了景元着想，涉及仙舟内务的部分，只好隐去各位的名字不提，还望海涵。
t_en: I'm submitting my written report to the Alliance, and I've already got a plan in mind. All of you will feature in the report, but for the sake of Jing Yuan, anything related to Xianzhou internal affairs will have names redacted — I hope you can forgive me.

t_ch: 我正想请求太卜这么做呢。建木复生，联盟高层不会轻视，多半会审查各个环节。多一事不如少一事。星穹列车如果牵扯进其中，恐怕一时也难以离开。
t_en: I was about to make the same request, Master Diviner. Since the Arbor's resurrection, I'm sure the Alliance will be poring over every detail of the report. I fear that if the Astral Express gets dragged into matters, leaving will not be an easy task.

t_ch: 是啊，景元这次的违规之举可不少，我得一一替他处置…唉，云骑将军们个个麻烦得很呐。
t_en: Mm. Jing Yuan has committed quite a few violations this time around, and I'll have to deal with them one by one... *sigh* The Cloud Knight generals are all such a hassle.

t_ch: 各位启程前，请先好好休养歇息一番。有什么想去的地方，尽可以逛逛。我要暂代云骑事务，无法奉陪了。
t_en: Before you leave, please make time to recuperate. If there's anywhere you'd like to visit, feel free to take a look. I must attend to some Cloud Knight matters — farewell for now.

t_ch: 对了，各位若是途径星槎海，我有一件东西想托付各位转交驭空。
t_en: Oh — if you pass through Starskiff Haven, I have something that I hope you can give to Yukong.

t_ch: 是…停云留下的东西？
t_en: Something Miss Tingyun left behind?

t_ch: 那时现场一片混乱，随幻胧显形后，停云的身躯也仿佛凭空蒸发。
t_en: *sigh* It was all so chaotic. When Phantylia took form, it was as if Tingyun vanished into thin air.

t_ch: 我明白了，这件事就交给我们吧。
t_en: ...I understand. Leave it with us.

t_ch: 那就有劳杨先生。本座瞧瞧今天剩下的公务清单。呃，好长……
t_en: Thank you, Mr. Yang. Now, let me take a look at my remaining duties for the day. *sigh* It's quite the list...

t_ch: 时间不早了，各位若找我，来太卜司的授事厅便可。
t_en: It's getting late. If you need me, I'll be in the Divination Commission Conclave Hall.

t_ch: 「建木」一直保持静止。有赖各位的浴血奋战，罗浮安全了。
t_en: The Ambrosial Arbor is dormant. Thanks to everyone's hard-fought battles, the Luofu is safe once more.

t_ch: 将军临行前交代我在府中因应。诸位既然凯旋，那提前备下的策略是一个也用不上啦，真是万幸。只一条除外……
t_en: Before he left, the general told me to handle things at the Seat of Divine Foresight. Fortunately, now that victory has been achieved, the plans we prepared will never see the light of day. However...

t_ch: 将军吩咐过，若他不能视事，就由太卜大人暂代职责。
t_en: The general did order that if he were unable to return to duty, then the master diviner would take over his duties temporarily.

t_ch: 将军他没事吧？
t_en: Is the general okay?

t_ch: 唉，我不是医士，说不出个子丑寅卯来。
t_en: Alas, I'm no healer, I'm afraid I couldn't say.

t_ch: 我吩咐随军医士做了尽可能周全的应急治疗。丹鼎司牵连「药王秘传」的阴谋，眼下要找个信得过的人为将军医治，也颇费一番功夫。
t_en: I ordered a military doctor to provide the most comprehensive emergency treatment they could. The Alchemy Commission was caught up in the Sanctus Medicus conspiracy — it took a lot of work to find someone trustworthy enough to heal the general.

t_ch: 如果用得上咱们的话，可不要客气。我虽然不太懂医术…但封住创口，避免伤势恶化的办法还是有的。
t_en: If we can help, don't hesitate to ask. I don't know much about medicine, but... there are lots of ways to seal wounds and prevent injuries from worsening.

t_ch: 放心吧。以长生种的强韧生命力，将军定能化险为夷。当年上阵冲杀时，遭遇的凶险百倍于此，他都挺过来了。
t_en: Don't worry, long-life species are resilient and strong — the general will pull through. He's faced down situations a hundred times more dangerous than this.

t_ch: 你们打算如何处置「建木」？
t_en: What do you plan on doing with the Ambrosial Arbor?

t_ch: 如何处置，唔…几千年前仙舟联盟对它无计可施，几千年后依然如此。
t_en: What do we plan on doing... *sigh* Thousands of years ago, the Xianzhou Alliance was at its wit's end trying to deal with it. Today, nothing's changed.

t_ch: 「建木」重生，除了帝弓的光矢之外，恐怕没什么能伤其根本。依靠持明族的力量，或许能加以抑制。但以如今持明族内的纠葛牵扯，恐怕此事也难以善了……
t_en: The Arbor was resurrected. Aside from the Arbiter's Lux Arrow, I'm afraid that nothing can materially harm it. We might be able to suppress it with the help of the Vidyadhara, but with internal strife ravaging their ranks, I'm afraid it's a long shot...

t_ch: 如果能定位星核深埋在建木中的位置，列车团也许可以帮上各位。
t_en: If you can locate exactly where the Stellaron is within the Arbor, then the Express might be able to help out.

t_ch: 瓦尔特先生的善意我们心领了。涉及「建木」…这般大事恐怕须得六御合议才能做出决定。
t_en: Thank you for your kind offer, Mr. Yang. But something as important and fundamental as the Ambrosial Arbor will require a meeting and deliberation from the Six Charioteers.

t_ch: 符玄看起来干得有模有样的…
t_en: Fu Xuan seems to be handling things pretty well...

t_ch: 等太卜大人在这里干上个二三十年再说吧。
t_en: Better to wait until the master diviner has another twenty or thirty years under her belt.

t_ch: 折冲战阵只是将军所有工作中最小的一部分。应对罗浮六御，十王司的审查乃至与联盟高层博弈……
t_en: Subduing the enemy is one of the most minor parts of a general's work. They have to meet with the Luofu's Six Charioteers and undergo Ten-Lords Commission inspections — all while dealing with the Xianzhou Alliance's top brass...

t_ch: 这些人人都不想面对，却又不得不日日上演的交涉戏码才是将军宝座上让人坐立不安的棘刺啊。
t_en: None of it is easy to navigate, but it's a daily responsibility. The crown of a general sits heavy on the head indeed.

t_ch: 差点忘了，我要为太卜收集情报，起草文书了。各位请自便。
t_en: I almost forgot — I need to gather data for the master diviner's draft report. Bye for now.

t_ch: 罗浮的麻烦…才刚刚开始。不知太卜能否顺利接手……
t_en: The Luofu's troubles... have only just begun. I don't know if the master diviner can take all this on.

t_ch: 事情总算告一段落，好在你们平安无事。
t_en: Things have come to a close for now. It's good that you came through unscathed.

t_ch: 辛苦杨叔一路照顾。
t_en: Thanks for looking out for me, Mr. Yang.

t_ch: 接下来准备做什么？
t_en: What are we going to do next?

t_ch: 太卜将转交纪念物的事情托付给了我们。我去一趟司辰宫，见见驭空。你和三月如果没有别的事情，最好和我一同去。
t_en: The master diviner asked us to pass on this item of Tingyun's. I'll go to the Palace of Astrum and meet with Yukong. If neither of you has anything urgent, it'd be best if you came too.

t_ch: 我正在琢磨该如何向驭空大人开口呢…也许她已经得知消息了吧。
t_en: How am I gonna break this to Madam Yukong...? Maybe she's already heard the news.

t_ch: 没想到这一路上咱们误打误撞，成了拯救罗浮的英雄。总觉得轻轻松松就干了许多了不得的事情，好不真实。
t_en: Well, we had a lot of stumbles along the way, but we still managed to kick butt and save the Luofu without breaking a sweat. Feels kinda surreal.

t_ch: 也许这就是咱们的命途啊。
t_en: Maybe this was all fate.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你的话听起来不怎么高兴啊。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, you don't sound very happy.

t_ch: 只是星核猎手的傀儡而已…
t_en: We're just mere puppets of the Stellaron Hunters...

t_ch: 呸呸呸！好事当然是咱们自己的功劳，本姑娘才不会把它算在那伙人头上哩。
t_en: Bah, no way! Everything good has come our way due to our hard work. I'm not letting them take any of the credit.

t_ch: 虽然看上去事情都在星核猎手操纵之中，但那是我们自己实现的未来。他们本事再大也没法让不存在的未来成真呀。
t_en: It may seem like the Stellaron Hunters are controlling everything, but we create our own future. No matter how powerful they are, they can't make a future that doesn't exist come true.

t_ch: 许多人因为我们的到来而得救，仙舟免去了一场灾祸。既然命中注定这件好事要发生，管它是由谁促成的呢，高兴一点，{NICKNAME}！
t_en: Since showing up, we've saved a lot of people and averted disaster for the whole Xianzhou. Who cares whether someone or something was directing it? Be happy, {NICKNAME}!

t_ch: 你接下来有什么打算？
t_en: What are your plans from here?

t_ch: …其实，我在想那个符太卜能不能帮我个忙。
t_en: ...Actually, I was wondering if Diviner Fu could do me a favor.

t_ch: 穷观阵神通广大，能穷举卡芙卡的过去…当时我就在想，那对我使用穷观阵，是否能算出本姑娘的过去呢？
t_en: The Matrix of Prescience has amazing powers, and can iterate and reiterate Kafka's past... So it got me thinking — if I turned the Matrix on me, could it calculate my past?

t_ch: 你可真是个小天才。
t_en: Pretty smart.

t_ch: 嘿嘿，那是。等你有空了，咱们一起去太卜司跑一趟，求太卜帮个忙。
t_en: Hee-hee, yup! When you're free, let's head over to the Divination Commission together and ask them for a favor.

t_ch: 符玄在的时候怎么不求她？
t_en: Why didn't you ask Fu Xuan for help while she was here?

t_ch: 咱脸皮薄嘛！这种私人小事怎么好在大庭广众下谈啊。
t_en: I was shy! Talking about personal stuff like that in front of everyone... it'd be too embarrassing!

t_ch: 等你有空了，咱们一起去太卜司跑一趟，看看符玄怎么说。
t_en: When you're free, let's go hit up the Divination Commission together and see what Fu Xuan has to say.

t_ch: 希望穷观阵能灵验，希望太卜不会拒绝咱们…
t_en: Here's hoping the Matrix is accurate, and that Diviner Fu won't decline our request...

t_ch: 重回罗浮，重新踏足鳞渊境…有种不真实的感觉。
t_en: Returning to the Luofu and Scalegorge Waterscape... it's a surreal feeling.

t_ch: 我一心离开，却阴差阳错，又回了这里。
t_en: I left so determined... Who would have thought that circumstances would draw me back once more?

t_ch: 仙舟好像也没怎么你呀。
t_en: It's not like the Xianzhou has done anything to you... yet.

t_ch: 现在知道我身份的，也只有寥寥几人而已。等消息传开了，谁知会如何？
t_en: There are only a handful of individuals who know my identity now. I do not wish to guess what could occur if word gets out.

t_ch: 你打算在这儿待多久？
t_en: How long do you plan on staying here?

t_ch: 很快就走。景元养病，云骑没人再能照拂我。六御会如何处置我，还不清楚。
t_en: I'll be gone very soon. Jing Yuan is still recovering, and the Cloud Knights won't protect me anymore... It remains to be seen how the Six Charioteers will react to my presence.

t_ch: 不过，至少现在我还安全。
t_en: But at least for now, I'm safe.

t_ch: 接下来你打算做什么？
t_en: What are you going to do next?

t_ch: 我想见见罗浮如今的持明龙尊。
t_en: I want to meet the current high elder of the Vidyadhara.

t_ch: 既然不能摆脱此身作为丹枫时造就的因果，我想更清楚地了解他的过去。我想看看自己能做些什么，弥补旧日的宿业。
t_en: It seems I won't be able to cast off Dan Feng's negative karma... so I'd like to learn more about his past. I want to find out what I can do to make up for his sins.

t_ch: 如果你们打算在罗浮逗留一阵的话，我恐怕没法和你们同行。抱歉了，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: If you're planning on an extended stay on the Luofu, I'm afraid I won't be able to join you. I'm sorry, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 我想去见见罗浮如今的持明龙尊。
t_en: I want to meet the current high elder of the Vidyadhara.

t_ch: 若能从她口中得知些过去的事情，多了解一点丹枫的所作所为，想必也能为弥补旧日宿业做些什么。
t_en: If she can tell me more about Dan Feng's actions, then perhaps I can do something to make up for his sins.

t_ch: 既然如此，请向十王传达我的意思……
t_en: I see. Please extend my regards to the Ten Lords...

t_ch: 吾会将消息带到，也请司舵节哀。
t_en: I will. Our condolences, Helm Master.

t_ch: 既然有客人来，吾就先行退去了。
t_en: You have guests. I shall take my leave.

t_ch: 诸位…我谨代表天舶司上下，感谢列车团在星核灾变中挽救了罗浮。
t_en: Ahem... On behalf of the Sky-Faring Commission, I would like to thank the crew of the Express for saving the Luofu from the Stellaron crisis.

t_ch: 驭空大人想必已经听说了，停云小姐……
t_en: Madam Yukong must have heard about Miss Tingyun...

t_ch: 我知道。看到四人离去，三人返回，我就明白符玄送来的战报说的都是真的。
t_en: Yes, I have heard. Seeing four leave, yet only three return, was enough for me to know that Fu Xuan's report was indeed correct.

t_ch: 这是停云小姐留下的东西…
t_en: Miss Tingyun left this behind...

t_ch: 停云……
t_en: Tingyun...

t_ch: 驭空小姐……
t_en: Madam Yukong...

t_ch: 抱歉…我明白…我明白的。我只是一时无法接受……
t_en: I'm sorry... I understand... It's just hard for me to accept...

t_ch: 谢谢你们将停云的东西带回了司辰宫。这次星核灾变中，我们失去了许多同袍、兄弟、姐妹、子女……
t_en: *sigh* Thank you for bringing Tingyun's belongings back to the Palace of Astrum. The Stellaron crisis has cost us too many comrades, brothers, sisters... children.

t_ch: 我想邀请各位作为遍历此战的见证，参与天舶司为阵亡者所举行的「慰灵奠仪」。不知各位意下如何？
t_en: I'd like to invite all of you, as witnesses to this war, to a soul-soothing ceremony hosted by the Sky-Faring Commission. Will you consider?

t_ch: 「慰灵奠仪」？
t_en: A "soul-soothing ceremony"?

t_ch: 用短生种的话说，就是葬礼。只是对仙舟上的长生种而言，身后事一直是个遥远又稀薄的概念。
t_en: To put it into short-life terms — a funeral. You see, for long-life species of the Xianzhou, death has always been a distant, mystical concept.

t_ch: 放在平日，魔阴身征兆出现前，便会有十王司的接引者将仙舟人带入因果殿，留下生平经历后归于寂灭。人们都习惯了以短促的「告别」代替仪式繁冗的「安葬」。
t_en: Ordinarily, the Ten-Lords Commission guides people to the Hall of Karma before any symptoms of mara are detected. There, they leave behind their lives and wait for their time to come. People are used to a short "farewell" as opposed to a tedious "burial" process.

t_ch: 唯一看重身后仪式的，只有我们这些寿元有限的狐族人。
t_en: Given our limited life spans, the only ones who place value on ceremony are us foxians.

t_ch: 在这一次灾难中，有数不清的云骑殉职或堕入魔阴身。因果殿来不及收纳彼等生平，他们便逝去了。
t_en: Countless Cloud Knights lost their lives or became mara-struck during the crisis. The Hall of Karma couldn't take them all in, and so they passed away.

t_ch: 所有仓促而至的死亡、未能实现的愿望，都在提醒我们…长生种的生命依然只是微不足道的有限片刻。
t_en: All of these sudden deaths and unfulfilled wishes remind us... that long-life species still live out insignificant and limited lives.

t_ch: 我想让那些逝去的人有个归处。用天舶司的方式，用狐人的奠仪。将逝者们的遗物放上星槎，送出仙舟，航入恒星，与之同辉。
t_en: By combining Sky-Faring Commission technology with foxian ceremony, we honor those who have passed on. We place items of the dead onto starskiffs, and send them out to sail between the stars — to shine brightly among them.

t_ch: 这不仅是安慰逝者，安慰那些不再能对我们说话的灵魂，也是在安慰他们留在尘世里的血亲、挚友和所有仙舟住民……
t_en: It's not just to comfort the dead — those souls who can never talk with us again — but also to comfort their surviving relatives, close friends, and indeed all residents of the Xianzhou...

t_ch: 我也希望能以这场仪式告别停云。这是我的私心。虽然她并非殁于战场的云骑，但她依然是我天舶司的人，也是这场灾变的受害者。
t_en: It's also my way of saying farewell to Tingyun. I know, I'm selfish. She may not have died a Cloud Knight, but she's still one of us here at the Sky-Faring Commission — a victim caught up in a wider conflict.

t_ch: 我想用这场仪式，将我的下属，和那个夺取她身份，以她面貌出现的绝灭大君分开。
t_en: I'd like to hold this ceremony as a way of distancing the memory of Tingyun from the Lord Ravager who tarnished her identity.

t_ch: 是的…我还是不愿相信。停云的下落，我一定会用自己的方式去探明。但眼下，我，我……
t_en: I... can still hardly believe it. I'll use my own methods to locate Tingyun's whereabouts, but at present... I...

t_ch: 这是我唯一能为她做的事了。
t_en: This is the least I can do for her.

t_ch: 我们能做些什么？
t_en: How can we help?

t_ch: 我们会出席仪式的。
t_en: We'll be there at the ceremony.

t_ch: 停云生平的物件，我已吩咐岩明在整理。我希望各位能从中选些物品，放上星槎。
t_en: I've instructed Yanming to sort through Tingyun's belongings. I hope you can pick some out to place around the starskiff.

t_ch: 这件事就按驭空大人的意思，交给我们来办就好。
t_en: Leave this to us, we'll take care of it as per your wishes, Madam Yukong.

t_ch: 驭空在此谢过诸位。我已请十王司判官通传了「慰灵奠仪」的想法，接下来我会前往迴星港督造星槎，筹备仪式。各位若有事，就来那边找我吧。
t_en: Once again, my thanks to all of you. I've asked the judges of the Ten-Lords Commission to ratify this soul-soothing ceremony, and have commissioned a special skiff at Stargazer Navalia for the ceremony. If you need anything, that's where I'll be.

t_ch: 平日里你总是嫌我碎嘴爱管闲事，你瞧我唠唠叨叨说了这么久，你怎么也不跳出来阻止我？
t_en: You always did say that I liked to gossip, and here I am rambling on proving you right again... If only you were here to cut me off...

t_ch: …那就别说了？
t_en: ...Or you could just cut yourself off?

t_ch: 岩明先生？
t_en: Mr. Yanming?

t_ch: 唉！是你们啊…我还以为是她回来了…是司舵派你们来的吧？
t_en: Oh! It's you... For a moment I thought she'd returned... Did the Helm Master send you over?

t_ch: 我们是来帮忙收拾停云小姐物品的。驭空大人打算把其中一些用在「慰灵奠仪」上。
t_en: We're here to help sort out Miss Tingyun's things. Madam Yukong wants to use some of them for her soul-soothing ceremony.

t_ch: 东西都理得差不多了，都在箱子里边，你们瞧瞧有哪些是用得上的？
t_en: Well, I've managed to get through pretty much everything — it's all in this box. Please, take your time.

t_ch: 咱们把箱子里的东西都摆出来瞧瞧吧？
t_en: Okay, let's see what there is.

t_ch: 接渡使的印鉴、一个小盒子、一把…刀？一张弓，还有这个被包得严严实实的东西…这是什么呀？
t_en: An Amicassador's seal, a small box... a knife? A bow, and something wrapped up tight... I wonder what this is.

t_ch: 看起来像是个古董？可谁会收藏这么奇怪的古董呢…
t_en: Looks like some kind of antique? But who'd want to hold on to something like this...

t_ch: 这小玩意儿我曾听停云说起过。它是古代狐人的民俗雕像。据说是求财之物，摆放起来，很是灵验。
t_en: Oh, Tingyun explained that one to me. It's a folk statuette from foxian antiquity. They say it can bring wealth if placed correctly.

t_ch: 包袱里还有一张字条，「赠岩明先生，招财进宝，无往不利」。岩明先生，看来这是停云小姐打算送给你的礼物。
t_en: There's also a note in the package: "This is for you, Mr. Yanming. Wishing you fortune and success in every endeavor." Yanming, it seems like this is a gift for you from Miss Tingyun.

t_ch: 我当时还说，自己要去请上一尊——咳，我没料到，只是提了一嘴的事，她竟记挂在心上了。
t_en: I... I remember asking her for one at the time... Ahem, this is unexpected. I only mentioned it in passing, but she remembered.

t_ch: …我和停云分属不同的商团，大家虽是同事，但彼此也是竞争对手。
t_en: ...Tingyun and I were from different guilds. We were competitors... but also colleagues.

t_ch: 往日里咱们贸易他乡，按习俗会带些当地世界的特产回来当作礼物，分送同僚朋友。
t_en: When we used to trade in other lands, we would bring back local specialties and distribute them among friends and other guild members — it became a custom.

t_ch: 一直以来，我和停云的「鸣火」都在争夺天舶司第一商团的名头，互相瞧对方不顺眼，送彼此的礼物都是些千奇百怪的东西：吃下会长腿毛的生发糖啊，一弹就发出尖叫震碎玻璃的六弦琴啊……
t_en: The rivalry between us and Whistling Flames to be the Sky-Faring Commission's top guild was always fierce. We would gift each other all kinds of bizarre oddities: Candy that made your leg hair grow, a violin that could shatter glass with its piercing shriek...

t_ch: 嘿…真让人措手不及，没想到停云最后送我的东西，这么正儿八经。
t_en: *sigh* ...I was completely unprepared for this. I never thought Tingyun would leave something behind for me that was so sincere and earnest.

t_ch: 要是不回礼，岂不是就这么输了她一筹？只是…该回赠什么好呢？
t_en: If I don't return a gift, I'll lose our little duel... But what could I possibly gift her back?

t_ch: 唔，说起来，除了印鉴之外，这刀和弓…怎么看都不像是停云小姐会有的东西，她给我的感觉可一直都是被珠宝包围的精致丽人。
t_en: Huh, besides the seal, the knife, and the bow... None of this seems like something Miss Tingyun would've kept. I thought she was more about jewelry and beauty.

t_ch: 这些东西里，会不会还有别的没送出的礼物啊，就像岩明先生收到的那件一样。咱们再瞧瞧？
t_en: Could there be other things similar to what Yanming got? We should take a look.

t_ch: 我想看看那个盒子…
t_en: I want to take a look in that box...

t_ch: 这小盒子里别的没有，倒是装着一把植物种子。
t_en: There's nothing else... except a handful of seeds.

t_ch: 盒子底下似乎还印着字…「不夜侯」。我想想，我记得在哪儿听过这个名字？
t_en: It looks like there's something printed on the bottom of the box... The Sleepless Earl. Let me think — where have I seen that name before?

t_ch: 我想看看那把刀…
t_en: I want to take a look at that knife...

t_ch: 虽然我不会做饭，但我认得，这应该就是菜刀了。
t_en: I can't cook to save my life, but one thing I'm sure of is: That's a kitchen knife.

t_ch: 这一路上也没见停云小姐拿类似的东西来防身吧…唔，显然它也是一件没来得及送出去的礼物。
t_en: I've never seen Miss Tingyun use anything like that to defend herself... It must be another gift that she never had time to send.

t_ch: 刀匣里有张广告呢。「尚滋味」，金人巷？这又是哪家店铺啊？
t_en: There's an ad in the knife case: "Spices Supreme," Aurum Alley? Which store is that again?

t_ch: 我想看看那张弓…
t_en: I want to take a look at that bow...

t_ch: 这张弓……
t_en: This bow...

t_ch: 三月七信手拨动弓弦，弦声铮琮。
t_en: March plucks the bowstring.

t_ch: 好弓。这，该不会是…要送给我的礼物吧？
t_en: It's a good bow. It couldn't be meant for me... could it?

t_ch: 你再想想…
t_en: Think again...

t_ch: 停云小姐身边也有使弓的人啊…
t_en: I'm sure you weren't the only archer she knew.

t_ch: 好啦，开个玩笑，活跃下气氛。
t_en: Alright, just kidding. Just trying to liven things up around here.

t_ch: 我明白了，咱们出发吧。
t_en: We should get going.

t_ch: 你知道这些东西该往哪儿送了吗，{NICKNAME}？
t_en: Do you know where we're supposed to take these things, {NICKNAME}?

t_ch: 停云啊停云…该回赠你什么好呢？如果你……
t_en: Tingyun, Tingyun... What am I going to get for you? If only you... *sigh*

t_ch: 欢迎光临「不夜侯」！客人几位，想要喝点儿什么茶？我是小店的主人梦茗，有什么吩咐您随时告诉我。
t_en: Welcome to the Sleepless Earl! I'm the owner here — the name's Mengming. How many of you are there? Which tea would you like today?

t_ch: 我们来代停云小姐送礼…
t_en: We're here on a gift-giving errand for Miss Tingyun...

t_ch: 哎，这是…这是停云姐姐答应送我的茶种！她果然从别的世界寻来了么？真是辛苦她了。
t_en: Oh! This is... This is the tea Miss Tingyun promised to get for me! She really went to another world for this? She's incredible.

t_ch: 我当初从双亲手中接下这爿茶馆，心想着要做一番前人未有的事业，开创新的茶品。
t_en: When I took over this teahouse from my parents, I thought I'd shake things up by creating a new tea product.

t_ch: 可惜仙舟上类似鳞渊春、丹鼎素针之类的名茶早已传承数千载，从外传入的混合茶饮也各行其道，要推陈出新实在很难。
t_en: Famous brews like Whale-Tide Spring or Vegetations in the Alchemy Cauldron have been around for millennia, and imported mixed teas have also found a niche. Introducing a new product into the industry is really hard.

t_ch: 停云姐姐在喝茶时听了我的难处，便拍胸脯保证，说她作为行商游历各个世界，一定能找到仙舟人也未必品尝过的全新茶种。
t_en: Miss Tingyun came to the teahouse one day and heard about my troubles — she said she could find me a brand-new strain during her travels — one that nobody on the Xianzhou had ever tasted.

t_ch: 我以为她是哄我这样的小孩儿开心呢，没想到，她真的言而有信啊。对了…停云姐姐怎么没来呀？
t_en: I just thought she was trying to cheer me up — I never thought she'd actually do it... Where is Miss Tingyun today?

t_ch: 她临时又要远行了…
t_en: She's had to embark on another long voyage...

t_ch: …是的。罗浮灾变平息，港口恢复通航，停云小姐领了天舶司的使命，又要出使其他世界了。
t_en: ...Yes. Now that the crisis has been averted and the ports are resuming operations, Miss Tingyun has been dispatched on business with the Sky-Faring Commission... out to other worlds.

t_ch: 这样啊，真是遗憾。那…各位请稍等。
t_en: Oh, really? That's a shame. Well... hold on a sec.

t_ch: 我之前按她的提议，改良鳞渊春、荫山绿和朝露小芽的品种，新制了一种茶饮，滋味甘爽悠长，特意取了姐姐的名字，唤作「遏云歌」。
t_en: Based on her suggestion, I improved the Whale-Tide Spring, Emerald Hills, and Dawndew strains to make a new variety with a sweet, long-lasting taste. I called it "Tingyun's Blend."

t_ch: 她享不了口福，我就请各位来饮这一杯吧。
t_en: Seeing as she can't enjoy it right now, I'll have to invite all of you to try a cup.

t_ch: 停云恐怕……
t_en: I'm afraid Miss Tingyun is...

t_ch: 停云姐姐……
t_en: Miss Tingyun...

t_ch: 我们从她的物品里找到了这盒种子，我想，停云小姐一定很希望将它送到你的手中。
t_en: We found this box of seeds among her belongings. I'm sure Miss Tingyun would have liked for you to have it.

t_ch: 谢谢各位，梦茗觉得…应该送停云姐姐什么才是。
t_en: ...Thank you, all of you. I think... I should gift something to Tingyun in return.

t_ch: 我之前按她的提议，改良鳞渊春、荫山绿和朝露小芽的品种，新泡制了一种茶饮，滋味甘爽悠长。特意取了姐姐的名字，唤作「遏云歌」。
t_en: Based on her suggestion, I improved the Whale-Tide Spring, Emerald Hills, and Dawndew strains to make a new variety with a sweet, long-lasting taste. I called it "Tingyun's Blend."

t_ch: 停云姐姐喝不到了，我就请各位来饮这一杯，当作是对她的纪念吧。
t_en: Seeing as Tingyun won't be able to try it... we should drink a cup to her memory.

t_ch: 片刻后，梦茗为你们端上了她所冲泡的茶饮。
t_en: A few moments later, Mengming serves the tea she brewed.

t_ch: 你们向梦茗简单讲述了停云一事的经过……
t_en: You tell Mengming about what happened to Tingyun...

t_ch: 片刻后，梦茗为你们端上了她所冲泡的茶饮。
t_en: A few moments later, Mengming serves the tea she brewed.

t_ch: 停云姐姐，真希望你能喝到这杯茶……
t_en: I can't wait for Miss Tingyun to try this tea!

t_ch: 停云姐姐，真希望你能喝到这杯茶……
t_en: I'm sorry you won't be able to try this tea, Miss Tingyun...

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你来啦。最近是不是闲了，有空在仙舟上到处逛逛了？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, how's it going? Did you take some time off? See any more of the Xianzhou?

t_ch: 你知不知道尚滋味这家店？
t_en: Have you heard of Spices Supreme?

t_ch: 这不就是长乐天金人巷里老饕聚集的饭馆么？怎么，你打算请我去大吃一顿吗？
t_en: Isn't that the place on Aurum Alley over in Exalting Sanctum? All the foodies go there. What about it? Planning on treating me to a feast?

t_ch: 金人巷？
t_en: Aurum Alley?

t_ch: 你给介绍介绍？
t_en: Go on...

t_ch: 就是长乐天的商业街呀。虽然最近因为星核降灾，人流稀疏了不少。
t_en: It's the main commercial street in the Exalting Sanctum, although it's a lot quieter since the whole Stellaron crisis thing.

t_ch: 我平时摸鱼打牌累了，都往那边的小吃店里吃碗陈婆豆腐。不好，你这一提，我不想上班了，赖你。
t_en: Whenever I'm tired of celestial jade or slacking off, I head over for a bowl of Granny Chen's Tofu. Darn it, now that you've brought it up, I suddenly don't feel like clocking in for work anymore.

t_ch: 客官你好哇，欢迎光临敝店，有什么想吃的菜？
t_en: Honored guests, welcome to our humble eatery! What can we get for you today?

t_ch: 我们来代停云小姐送礼…
t_en: We're here on a gift-giving errand for Miss Tingyun...

t_ch: 这是停云小姐送我的…？
t_en: Something from Miss Tingyun for me...?

t_ch: 哈哈哈，真是难为她的用心了。她那样娇滴滴的人儿，竟然真送了我一柄菜刀。
t_en: Hahaha, what a precious person she is. A sweet thing like her, gifting me a kitchen knife.

t_ch: 当初她在我这儿吃饭，听我说起「不吃不能打倒自己的食材」的信条。随后又让我讲讲自己在其他世界做菜、狩猎的经历。
t_en: When she first ate here, I told her my motto: "You can't better your own food unless you taste it." Then she got me to talk about my hunting and cooking experiences out on other worlds.

t_ch: 停云小姐听得津津有味，缠着我一个菜接一个菜说…末了听完了还要送我一件礼物，说是「宝剑赠英雄，名厨配好刀」。
t_en: She was captivated — she pestered me about dish after dish... At the end, she mentioned she wanted to get me a gift: "A sword for a hero, and a knife for a chef" — that's how she put it.

t_ch: 这不，她大约是从其他世界找来了珍贵的奇金异材，锻成了这把刀。瞧这刀锋锐利的紧，怕是一下劈开塔拉萨钢背龟的外壳也使得。
t_en: She probably came across some rare mineral and forged it by hand. Look how sharp it is! I bet it'd cut straight through a Thalassa Titanium Terrapin shell.

t_ch: 其实，停云小姐太客气了。金人巷中的大小商户谁没有受过「鸣火」商团的恩惠？她举办的海市，给咱们这些小商户招徕了域外的商客。要说送礼，该是咱们送她才对。
t_en: *sigh* Miss Tingyun is too kind. Who among the Aurum Alley vendors hasn't been spoiled by the generosity of Whistling Flames? Her Grand Fair puts small merchants like us in touch with big intergalactic vendors. If we're talking gifts, it's us who should be gifting her something.

t_ch: 对了，我听说商港又开了，停云小姐怕是又忙起来了吧？
t_en: I heard the trade port is open again for business. Miss Tingyun must be real busy, right?

t_ch: 没错。
t_en: Indeed.

t_ch: 停云小姐分不开身，所以这份礼物只能由我们送来了。
t_en: Miss Tingyun couldn't tear herself away from work, so we've had to gift this on her behalf today.

t_ch: 真是辛苦了，不如我当场露一手，为大家做一道菜，请你们品尝品尝，就当是回礼了。
t_en: Really, thank you so much. Why don't I give you all a demonstration and prepare a dish? My treat — I'd love to repay this kindness.

t_ch: 说起来，停云小姐最初被敝店吸引，也是因为这道「红油乱斩牛杂」。嘿嘿，鲜香辛辣，光是闻闻味道就能教人食指大动。就连她那样精致的妹子也抵不住这诱惑。
t_en: Speaking of which, it was our Chili Beef Offal Stew that first attracted Miss Tingyun to our restaurant, hehe. It's spicy, sumptuous, and guaranteed to get the mouth watering. Not even a girl as refined as Tingyun could resist the temptation.

t_ch: 其实…「停云」是…
t_en: Actually... Tingyun...

t_ch: 各位…不会是骗我的吧？
t_en: This... This is real, right...?

t_ch: 你们说的那怪物…是从哪儿跑来的？我…我真想用手里这把刀，将它细细切做臊子。
t_en: The monster you mentioned... where did it come from? ...I wish—I wish I could take this knife and cut it to ribbons...

t_ch: 罢了，我一个厨子，讲这些没用的做什么。辛苦几位，我来为你们做一道菜吧，就当是给你们，也是给停云小姐的回礼。
t_en: *sigh* Forget it... matters like these are beyond the control and understanding of a cook like me... Thank you, all of you. Let me prepare a dish for you... as a gift for Miss Tingyun.

t_ch: 说起来，这道「红油乱斩牛杂」，也是把停云小姐吸引来敝店的菜色。这份鲜香辛辣，可惜她尝不到了。你们几位，可要替她大吃一碗！
t_en: It was our Chili Oil Beef Offal Stew that first attracted Miss Tingyun to our restaurant... I can't believe that she'll never taste it again. Please, you'll have to eat her share too.

t_ch: 燕翠转身进了后厨，为你们端来了一碗热气腾腾的菜肴。
t_en: Yancui goes into the back kitchen and brings out a steaming bowl of food.

t_ch: 你们向燕翠简单讲述了停云一事的经过……
t_en: You tell Yancui a brief account of what happened to Tingyun...

t_ch: 燕翠转身进了后厨，为你们端来了一碗热气腾腾的菜肴。
t_en: Yancui goes into the back kitchen and brings out a steaming bowl of food.

t_ch: 没能让停云小姐吃到我做的菜啊…
t_en: It's a shame Miss Tingyun's too busy today...

t_ch: 没能让停云小姐吃到我做的菜啊…
t_en: If only Miss Tingyun could try this one last time...

t_ch: 诸位怎么来了？
t_en: What brings you here?

t_ch: 我们来送停云小姐的礼物…
t_en: We're here to pass on a gift from Miss Tingyun...

t_ch: 这把弓，是停云为我挑选的礼物？她明白我的痛苦，我却已不能再为她做什么了……
t_en: This bow... Did Tingyun pick it out for me? She understood my pain — it's a shame I can no longer do anything for her...

t_ch: 三十年前，我曾参加过一场惨烈的战争。我和我的挚友一同出航，但回来时却只剩下了我孑然一身。
t_en: Thirty years ago, I fought in a terrible war. My comrade and I set sail together, but only I returned.

t_ch: 这场战争结束后，就像是害怕去触碰战争留下的伤痕一样。罗浮仙舟一直沿着航路休养生息，吐纳贸易……
t_en: The scars of that war never truly healed. Still, the Luofu traced out its arc of recovery, and continued to trade...

t_ch: 我也以为自己厌倦了飞行，丧失了开弓射敌的勇气。于是我埋头躲进天舶司的事务案牍里，不想再看天空一眼。
t_en: I felt tired of voyaging — like I'd lost the courage to pull on a bowstring ever again. I hid away in the Sky-Faring Commission and buried myself in work, never wanting to see the sky again.

t_ch: 虽然升任司舵，我却是行伍出身，本不擅长这些心思细密的经营。停云她却是个天生的商人，职分上是我的下属，但她总爱和我谈论商事，给我建议。
t_en: Despite rising to Helm Master, my military career hadn't prepared me for the type of meticulous planning work now confronting me. Tingyun, on the other hand, was a born merchant — always discussing business matters with me and offering up advice — even if she was my subordinate.

t_ch: 她不曾在战场上与我并肩战斗，但也是另一种意义上的「战友」。没有停云他们与商团的帮助，罗浮就无法在这短短三十年间恢复生机。
t_en: She never fought alongside me on the battlefield, but in her own way, she became a comrade-in-arms. Without the help of Tingyun and the guild, the Luofu would not have been able to recover in the space of just thirty short years.

t_ch: 我一度以为时代变了，仙舟也变了。停云这样的人才是新一代天舶司的未来，她能为罗浮带来繁荣。不像我，只擅长为血和火奔走。
t_en: I used to think that the Xianzhou had changed with the times. Geniuses like Tingyun were the future for the Sky-Faring Commission's next generation — they would bring prosperity to the Luofu. I was only ever suited to the flames of war.

t_ch: 我错了，在将反物质军团的卒子一个接一个消灭殆尽以前，仙舟仍然需要我…需要我这样为血火奔走在天空中的人。
t_en: I was wrong. Only when the last minions of the Antimatter Legion are wiped out, will I become useless to the Xianzhou... The Xianzhou needs people like me — those willing to cruise the sky and fight the flames.

t_ch: 停云也为其他人准备了礼物？她还是我记忆中的那个停云…
t_en: Tingyun prepared gifts for others, too? That's just like her...

t_ch: 谢谢你们，能帮她完成这些后事，不留遗憾。
t_en: Thank you for helping her complete all these tasks. She can depart in peace.

t_ch: 仪式所需的星槎还在准备中，各位完成了手头的事情，就请回到我这边。
t_en: We're still preparing the starskiff for the ceremony. Please, everyone, come back to me when your work is complete.

t_ch: 我听说停云也为其他人准备了礼物？她还是我记忆中的那个停云…
t_en: I heard Tingyun prepared gifts for others, too? That's just like her...

t_ch: 谢谢你们，能帮她完成这些后事，不留遗憾。
t_en: Thank you for helping her complete all these tasks. She can depart in peace.

t_ch: 仪式所需的星槎还在准备中，各位完成了手头的事情，就请回到我这边。
t_en: We're still preparing the starskiff for the ceremony. Please, everyone, come back to me when your work is complete.

t_ch: 为仪式准备的星槎都已备妥了。各位，将停云的纪念物放上星槎吧。
t_en: The starskiff is ready for the ceremony now. Everyone, please place your objects aboard the starskiff.

t_ch: 等、等等！等等我！
t_en: W—Wait! Wait for me!

t_ch: 停云小姐为我备了礼物，同样身为接渡使的我可不能失了礼数……
t_en: Miss Tingyun prepared a gift for me. As a fellow Amicassador, I cannot fail to honor our custom...

t_ch: 岩明先生，你准备了什么？
t_en: Yanming, what is it that you've prepared?

t_ch: 我…我带来了一个纸鸢。希望你们别嘲笑这份心意微薄，虽然它不能和停云送出的那些贵重礼物相提并论，但这份回礼，有它自己的意义。
t_en: I... I've brought a paper kite. I know it may seem simple compared to the precious items that Tingyun gifted others in the past... but it has a deeper meaning.

t_ch: 我听说在狐人的礼俗里，纸鸢是用来宽慰那些无法再起飞的飞行士的灵魂。停云和我虽然不是真正的飞行士，但我们这辈子都在和星空打交道。
t_en: I heard that foxians have a tradition where paper kites are used to comfort the souls of pilots who can no longer take to the skies. Tingyun and I were never pilots in the strictest sense of the word... but we spent much of our lives out among the stars.

t_ch: 我想，若是能让停云再次飞起来，她应该会很高兴。
t_en: For her to be able to take wing once again... would make her very happy.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，咱们手头的东西，你觉得该挑哪些放上星槎啊？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, out of all this stuff we've got, what do you think we should place on the starskiff?

t_ch: 接渡使的印鉴
t_en: The Amicassador's seal

t_ch: 谢谢你为天舶司，为罗浮所做的一切。这方小小印章，是仙舟繁荣的基石。
t_en: Thank you for everything you've done for the Sky-Faring Commission and the Luofu. This small seal is the foundation of the Xianzhou's prosperity.

t_ch: 以她为名的茶
t_en: The tea named after her

t_ch: 这是梦茗小姐为你准备的茶，以你的名字命名。
t_en: This is the tea that Mengming has made, especially named after you.

t_ch: 哎？{NICKNAME}你忘了吗，咱已经把那杯茶给喝了呀？
t_en: Hmm? {NICKNAME}, did you forget that we already drank that back at the teahouse?

t_ch: 她热爱的菜肴
t_en: Her favorite dish

t_ch: 这是燕翠小姐代表金人巷商户们所送的礼物，你一定会喜欢。
t_en: This is a gift from Miss Yancui on behalf of all the restaurants on Aurum Alley. You are going to love this.

t_ch: 呃…那道菜已被你吃完了，我可怎么再给你变一盘出来啊？
t_en: Uh, you already ate that, remember? I can't just get you another one now, can I?

t_ch: 告慰的纸鸢
t_en: The soul-soothing paper kite

t_ch: 这一回，咱们不用再争个高下了。去吧，飞去更远的世界吧。
t_en: This time, we needn't compete. Go, fly on to other distant worlds.

t_ch: 停云，天舶司不会忘记你的…我会查明真相，若你罹难了，我会为你复仇。
t_en: The Sky-Faring Commission shall never forget you, Tingyun. I will seek out the truth, and if it is discovered that you were taken from us, I swear to avenge your unjust end.

t_ch: 时辰已到，该是举行「慰灵奠仪」的时候了。诸位，我们在星槎海的坤舆台见。
t_en: It is time for the soul-soothing ceremony. Please make your way to Earthrise Agora in Starskiff Haven.

t_ch: 各位，将大家召集在此，是为重申罗浮仙舟对列车团无名客义举的感激。
t_en: Present company is gathered to reiterate the Xianzhou Luofu's esteemed gratitude for the magnanimous actions of the Nameless.

t_ch: 我想符卿之前已和大家谈及此事。但我认为你们所做的一切，罗浮远远无法回报。故此，我代表罗浮云骑军，送给诸位一枚象征「结盟之谊」的玉兆。
t_en: I am sure Lady Fu has given voice to this already, but the Luofu is greatly indebted to you. Therefore, on behalf of the Luofu Cloud Knights, I hereby present you with a jade abacus — a symbol of our allied friendship.

t_ch: 玉兆？
t_en: A jade abacus?

t_ch: 这是纪念品吗？
t_en: Is this a souvenir?

t_ch: 这…确实可以算得上是某种纪念品。但它可不是你到此一游能买回的小礼物。
t_en: It... could indeed be considered a souvenir of a certain variety. But not one you could find in a gift store.

t_ch: 数千年前，联盟成立时，诸仙舟共盟一誓，并铭刻玉兆盟载为证。天地荒灭，不渝此誓。
t_en: Back when the Alliance was first established — all those thousands of years ago — the Xianzhou ships swore an oath, etching the record into a jade abacus. The world may crumble and the heavens may fall, but this oath shall never be broken.

t_ch: 这枚玉兆也是如此，记录着罗浮云骑对列车团的承诺，同时它也是一枚信标——握紧它，就会向我手中成对的玉兆送出消息。
t_en: The same is true of this jade abacus — it is a record of the Luofu Cloud Knights' promise to the crew of the Astral Express. It is also a beacon — grip it tightly, and it will send a message to the jade abacus here in my hand.

t_ch: 无论银河浩瀚、苦旅迢迢，罗浮云骑都会赶来与列车汇合，完成各位所托。
t_en: No matter how astronomically distant you are, the Luofu Cloud Knights will always come to the aid of the Crew, whatever your need may be.

t_ch: 哇，这礼物还真是下了血本啊。
t_en: Wow, now that's what I call a pay-off.

t_ch: 呃…当然，如此重要的东西，请不要为了微不足道或违背盟谊的事情而擅用，这点大家能理解吧？
t_en: Ahem... Of course, I trust that such an important article will not be used for trivial or inappropriate circumstances. I hope you can understand...

t_ch: 理解理解，懂得懂得。
t_en: Yup, got it. Say no more. Sure thing.

t_ch: 多谢将军的厚意。
t_en: Thank you for your generosity, General.

t_ch: 丹恒。
t_en: Dan Heng.

t_ch: 将军…
t_en: General...

t_ch: 我奉十王司的诰谕，赦免对你的流放令。自此刻起，你可以自由在罗浮之上来去。
t_en: In accordance with the edict of the Ten-Lords Commission, I am hereby authorized to relieve your banishment decree. From this day henceforth, you may come and go freely on the Luofu...

t_ch: 好耶！
t_en: Nice!

t_ch: 好耶！
t_en: Nice!

t_ch: 倒也不意外。
t_en: Not a complete surprise.

t_ch: 不过我要提醒你，丹枫的罪孽牵扯深远。而有些人的想法，如同鳞渊境的潮动，绝不会随一纸命令轻易改变。
t_en: ...But I must remind you that the crimes of Dan Feng have had far-reaching implications... and some people, such as those in Scalegorge Waterscape, will not be much moved by the issuance of a paper edict.

t_ch: 我只能保证你的来去自由，却无法保证你的安全。这点还请你理解。
t_en: While I can guarantee your freedom to come and go as you please, I cannot guarantee your safety. Again, I hope you can understand.

t_ch: 我明白。
t_en: I understand.

t_ch: 送完礼，心情也轻松了不少…连伤都不太痛了。此时此刻，本想念两句诗助兴遣怀…不过我不像符卿饱学，还是算了吧。
t_en: This issuing of gifts brings with it a sense of relief... Even my wound is feeling much improved. The occasion calls for a line or two of poetry... though I feel my efforts would be overshadowed by the erudition of Lady Fu. Another time, perhaps.

t_ch: 无名客的前路还很长，祝列车通途坦荡。那么，告辞了。
t_en: The Express and its passengers have a long voyage ahead of them. May that voyage be smooth and untrammeled. I bid you Farewell.

t_ch: 我收到了姬子的消息。列车观测到了玉界门重新打开，她问咱们什么时候回列车。
t_en: Himeko messaged me — the Express detected the Jade Gate's re-opening. She asked whether we'd be heading back any time soon.

t_ch: 她还特地问了丹恒的情况。我想，这个问题只有你本人回去才是最好的回答吧？
t_en: She was also asking after you, Dan Heng. I think it'd be best for you to update her in person, don't you think?

t_ch: 我想也是该先返回列车，向姬子小姐道个平安了。
t_en: She must have been worried. I'll return to the train and put her mind at rest.

t_ch: 姬子姐一定也等不及听咱们讲讲这次旅途上发生的事情吧？
t_en: Himeko must be eager to hear about what we've been up to on this mission too, right?

t_ch: 呃，等等，我怎么给忘了，该给列车长捎带点儿礼物呢。{NICKNAME}，你呢，在仙舟上还有什么没完成的事吗？
t_en: Uh, hang on. How could I forget. We should bring something back for the conductor. {NICKNAME}, have you got any unfinished business on the Xianzhou?

t_ch: 我想见见旅途中认识的朋友…
t_en: I'd like to visit some of the friends we made along the way...

t_ch: 对哦，咱们都还没和有些人告别呢。
t_en: Oh yeah, there are some people we haven't said goodbye to yet!

t_ch: 应该…没有了。
t_en: Uhh... don't think so...

t_ch: 瞧我这记性。咱们还没来得及和这回旅行中认识的人告别呢。
t_en: I've got goldfish memory — we haven't had a chance to say goodbye to everyone we met so far on this trip.

t_ch: 那么，我和丹恒就先一步返回列车了。三月，你和{NICKNAME}可要早点回来啊。
t_en: Fine, fine. Dan Heng and I will go back to the Express. The two of you come back soon, okay?

t_ch: 放心吧杨叔～
t_en: Don't worry, Mr. Yang.

t_ch: 看着这些星槎，它们飞离玉界门的瞬间，有种不真实的梦幻感。这些船会花上多久，飞向哪一颗星星呢？
t_en: There's a dreamlike quality to watching these starskiffs depart through the Jade Gate. How long will these ships sail, and which stars are they traveling to?

t_ch: 放在宇宙的尺度下，长生种与短生种的生命似乎也并没有什么差别。仙舟住民追寻所得的长生，还不及一颗星星呼吸闪烁一瞬。他们的悲伤也和我们并无区别。
t_en: From a universal perspective, there is little difference between the lives of long and short-life species. The transcendence that the Xianzhou pursues is nothing compared to the enduring majesty of the stars. And the grief felt here... is no different from our own.

t_ch: 杨叔诗意大发。
t_en: Didn't know you were a poet, Mr. Yang.

t_ch: 你回来了，{NICKNAME}。我和姬子正聊着这次旅行呢。
t_en: You're back, {NICKNAME}. Himeko and I were just discussing our journey.

t_ch: 一程旅行又到了尽头，万事万物都得有个结局。结局之后就是全新的开始。
t_en: This little excursion has reached its conclusion — all things must come to an end. Still, some endings spark a new beginning.

t_ch: 我回来了。
t_en: Sorry to interrupt the poetry...

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你回来啦。我听瓦尔特说了你们这一路的经历。真羡慕，能看到「建木」和玄鹿，太卜司法阵，还有壮观的鳞渊境……
t_en: {NICKNAME}, you're back. Welt was telling me about your experiences — I'm more than a little envious! The Ambrosial Arbor, the Ebon Deer, the Divination Commission Matrix, Scalegorge Waterscape...

t_ch: 我也敲打了丹恒，让他多多少少讲了讲自己的经历。不过你懂，唉，原本可以大谈特谈的事情，他用三言两语就草草说完了。
t_en: I pestered Dan Heng to tell me about his experiences, but alas, what could've been a magnificent saga was reduced to a few words and a grunt.

t_ch: 不如下回就让瓦尔特留守列车，我带着你们几个一起开拓新世界。
t_en: Next time, I think I should be the one trailblazing with you guys — Welt can stay on the Express.

t_ch: 列车什么时候有了这样的轮替值班制度？
t_en: ...Since when did the work roster just change like that?

t_ch: 所以咱们的下一站是？
t_en: What's our next stop?

t_ch: 匹诺康尼。还记得吗？在卡芙卡发来邀请前，咱们本来打算去那里。
t_en: Penacony. Do you remember? Before Kafka's proposal, that was our original destination.

t_ch: 帮我回忆回忆？
t_en: Think I need a reminder...

t_ch: 按照列车智库的记载，匹诺康尼原本是公司用来流放罪犯的监狱星，至少在记录它的时代是如此。
t_en: The Express' records show that Penacony was a prison planet used by the IPC to exile criminals... At least, it was at the time of recording.

t_ch: 不过，{RUBY_B#万界之癌}星核{RUBY_E#}爆发后，它投入了{RUBY_B#同谐}希佩{RUBY_E#}的怀抱，据说被改造成无比繁荣的梦之国度。
t_en: However, following a {RUBY_B#Cancer of All Worlds}Stellaron{RUBY_E#} burst, the planet fell into the arms of {RUBY_B#the Harmony}Xipe{RUBY_E#}. They say it's been transformed into a prosperous and ethereal realm.

t_ch: 我记得。
t_en: I remember.

t_ch: 这回该按原计划跃迁了吧？
t_en: So, we can warp jump as planned this time?

t_ch: 是啊，被星核猎手们打乱的计划总算能重回正轨了。咱们的下一个目标是匹诺康尼，还记得吧？
t_en: Yes. No more Stellaron Hunter interruptions — it's time to get our original plan back on track. Our next stop is Penacony, remember?

t_ch: 帮我回忆回忆？
t_en: Think I need a reminder...

t_ch: 按照列车智库的记载，匹诺康尼原本是公司用来流放罪犯的监狱星，至少在记录它的时代是如此。
t_en: The Express' records show that Penacony was a prison planet used by the IPC to exile criminals... At least, it was at the time of recording.

t_ch: 不过，{RUBY_B#万界之癌}星核{RUBY_E#}爆发后，它投入了{RUBY_B#同谐}希佩{RUBY_E#}的怀抱，据说被改造成的无比繁荣的梦之国度。
t_en: However, following a {RUBY_B#Cancer of All Worlds}Stellaron{RUBY_E#} burst, the planet fell into the arms of {RUBY_B#the Harmony}Xipe{RUBY_E#}. They say it's been transformed into a prosperous and ethereal realm.

t_ch: 我记得。
t_en: I remember.

t_ch: 「家族」正在那儿举办一场宴会，他们向列车发来了请柬。我很好奇那儿究竟发生了什么，所以我接受了邀请。
t_en: The Family is throwing a banquet there, and they sent invitations to the Express. I was curious about what was happening there, so I accepted.

t_ch: 等列车长准备完毕，咱们就可以出发前往下一站了。
t_en: When the conductor is ready, we can set off for the next stop.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你来啦。最近是不是闲了，有空在仙舟上到处逛逛了？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, how's it going? Did you take some time off? See any more of the Xianzhou?

t_ch: 你知不知道尚滋味这家店？
t_en: Have you heard of Spices Supreme?

t_ch: 这不就是长乐天金人巷里老饕聚集的饭馆么？怎么，你打算请我去大吃一顿吗？
t_en: Isn't that the place on Aurum Alley over in Exalting Sanctum? All the foodies go there. What about it? Planning on treating me to a feast?

t_ch: 外客初来乍到，逛的都是星槎海的宣夜大街。那儿名声在外，热闹是热闹，但要说好吃的好玩的地方哪儿多，还得去金人巷。
t_en: Tourists fresh off the starskiff always head to Starwatcher Avenue in Starskiff Haven — it's one of those bustling tourist streets... but if you want the real deal on local snacks, you gotta get to Aurum Alley. I've marked it out for you on your map.

t_ch: 我平时摸鱼打牌累了，都往那边的小吃店里吃碗陈婆豆腐。不好，你这一提，我不想上班了，赖你。
t_en: Whenever I'm tired of celestial jade or slacking off, I head over for a bowl of Granny Chen's Tofu. Darn it, now that you've brought it up, I suddenly don't feel like clocking in for work anymore.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，准备好了的话，请选几样纪念物放在星槎上吧。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, if you're ready, please select a few items to place aboard the starskiff.

t_ch: 纸鸢本是童玩，不过展翅高飞的意向很能宽慰狐人飞行士们的心，这个传统便被沿用了下来。
t_en: Paper kites are often gifted to children, but as a symbol of spreading one's wings and soaring high up into the sky, they are also a comfort to foxian pilots. It's an old tradition that's carried on to this day.

t_ch: 星槎中摆放着你们挑选的物品，在不久后，它将起航飞向不知名的恒星，并最终消逝在它的辉光里。
t_en: Soon, the starskiff will carry the items you selected to the stars unknown, vanishing in the vastness of their halo.

t_ch: 无论长生、短生，这将是所有人的归途。
t_en: Long-life or short-life, everyone sails towards the same destination.

t_ch: 我曾在方壶仙舟上举行过同样的典礼，那已是三十年前的事了。痛苦的记忆不会随岁月淡去，我不想再目睹同样的场面了。
t_en: I once held the same ceremony on the Fanghu, some thirty years or so ago now. Painful memories don't ever fade away with time, and I don't want to bear witness to those scenes again.

t_ch: 这一路匆匆忙忙、兜兜转转的。有些朋友才刚认识，就要告别了，想想还有些舍不得呢。
t_en: We've been so busy running around in circles, we haven't gotten the chance to say goodbye to friends we've just met — I feel like parting is still such sweet sorrow.

t_ch: 该和谁打个招呼呢？太卜？青雀？小神医？还是公输先生？唔…{NICKNAME}，要不都去见一见吧？
t_en: Who should I go to first? The Master Diviner? Qingque? The miracle doctor? Or what about Master Gongshu? *sigh* {NICKNAME}, shall we go and meet them all?

t_ch: 我离开时只来得及仓促向姬子小姐道别。
t_en: When I left the train, I only had time to say a quick goodbye to Himeko.

t_ch: 是时候回去报个平安，并且感谢她的开导了。
t_en: I should go back and give her an update... and thank her for her guidance.

t_ch: 我和丹恒会先一步返回列车。你和三月办完了事可要早点回来啊。
t_en: Dan Heng and I will go back to the Express first. You and March finish up here and come back soon, alright?

t_ch: 匹诺康尼正在举办一场宴会，我已接受了「家族」的邀请，打算去那儿看看。
t_en: Penacony is throwing a banquet — I've received an invitation from The Family.

t_ch: 等列车长准备完毕，咱们就可以出发前往下一站了。
t_en: When the conductor is ready, we can set off for the next stop.

t_ch: 仙舟的旅程到此告一段落了，接下来咱们该按原计划前进了吧？
t_en: Our time on the Xianzhou has come to an end. Back to the original plan, I suppose?

t_ch: 你好？虽然咱们这一路上并未照面，但彦卿已从将军那边听说了列车团的英勇。彦卿十分佩服！
t_en: Oh hi, I know we haven't got the chance to get acquainted, but I've heard a lot of good things about the crew from the general. I have to say I'm very impressed.

t_ch: 我打算离开罗浮仙舟了。
t_en: I'm leaving the Luofu.

t_ch: 你们…这就要走了嘛？
t_en: So soon?

t_ch: 唉，我本想为将军分忧，谁知这一次却弄巧成拙。我也该好好反省一下了。
t_en: *sigh* I wanted to help the general, but things didn't turn out how I wanted them to be. I've learned my lesson.

t_ch: 另外，彦卿还有一个不情之请。
t_en: Also, I have a rather abrupt request.

t_ch: 与丹恒先生交手后，自觉技艺还不够精深，要是{NICKNAME}有空赐教……
t_en: After fighting Dan Heng, I feel like my skills are lacking somewhere. If you have any time to coach me...

t_ch: 我不是谦虚，还是找丹恒吧…
t_en: I think Dan Heng is a better match for you...

t_ch: 我怕他生我的气，虽然很想与他再战一回……
t_en: I'm worried that he still holds some grudge against me. But to be honest, I'd love to have another spar with him.

t_ch: 我倒是不介意和你过两招…
t_en: We could schedule in a couple of rounds...

t_ch: 那就一言为定。
t_en: Deal.

t_ch: 一路顺风。
t_en: Safe travels.

t_ch: 一路顺风。
t_en: Safe travels.

t_ch: 你是来道别的？
t_en: Are you here to say goodbye?

t_ch: 我打算离开罗浮仙舟了。
t_en: I'm leaving the Luofu.

t_ch: 倒也不必如此着急，本座算到你还会回到罗浮仙舟很多次，而且一定会来继续麻烦我。
t_en: There's no need to be so anxious. I predict that you will return to the Xianzhou often, and you will definitely continue to trouble us when you do.

t_ch: 所以，告别就算了吧。
t_en: Therefore, forget about any farewells.

t_ch: 我打算离开罗浮仙舟了。
t_en: I'm leaving the Luofu.

t_ch: 就算之后回来，现在也是告别。
t_en: Even if I do return, this is still a farewell, right?

t_ch: 难道你真的不想说点儿什么吗？
t_en: ...Is that really everything you want to say?

t_ch: 好了，好了，明白了。
t_en: Alright, okay, I understand.

t_ch: 本座就祝你坦途畅通，履险如夷。
t_en: I wish your travels be fleeting of foot, and may your crises be effortlessly resolved.

t_ch: 祝你坦途畅通，履险如夷。
t_en: May your travels be fleeting of foot, and may your crises be effortlessly resolved.

t_ch: 你好呀，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: Hello, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 我打算离开罗浮仙舟了。
t_en: I'm leaving the Luofu.

t_ch: 踏上下一段旅途吗…真好呀，我什么时候也能离开这里呢？
t_en: ...To start your next journey... That's great. *sigh* I can't wait to escape the Commission again...

t_ch: 对了，你肯定还会再回来的吧！你要是回来了记得来找我呀，我们还可以一起溜出去。
t_en: Oh, make sure you come visit! Next time you're here, we'll put my plan into action...

t_ch: 我都想好啦，要是溜出去了，咱俩就一起去金人巷，那里的小吃可好吃了。
t_en: I've got it all figured out. We sneak out, head over to Aurum Alley, and pig out on the snacks there!

t_ch: 我自己一个人就能去。
t_en: ...Or I could just go there myself.

t_ch: …我知道哪家好吃，你还是带上我吧。
t_en: ...Hmph, I know all the best places, — you'll be lost without me.

t_ch: 说好了，能溜出去就去。
t_en: Better start planning that escape route then.

t_ch: 嗯，一言为定。
t_en: Mm-hmm, it's a deal.

t_ch: 要是一路有什么头疼脑热、伤筋动骨、三长两短的麻烦，不要忘了来找我看喔！本小姐绝不收你诊金！
t_en: Aaaand don't forget to come see me if you get any headaches, fever, tendon pain, joint pain — anything! My treatment is on the house!

t_ch: 要记得来看我喔！
t_en: Remember to come and see me!

t_ch: 能看见你，多半意味着你们在仙舟上的事情已经忙得差不多了？
t_en: I'm guessing seeing you here probably means your affairs on the Xianzhou are mostly complete?

t_ch: 我打算离开罗浮仙舟了。
t_en: I'm leaving the Luofu.

t_ch: 这就要走了吗？我还以为你们打算再多待一段时间呢。
t_en: Is that it? I thought you were gonna stay for at least a little longer...

t_ch: 不知道杨先生学会帝垣琼玉牌没有…要是他没有学会，让他回来找我，我包教包会。
t_en: Did Welt learn how to play celestial jade in the end...? If he hasn't got the hang of it yet, tell him to come see me and I'll show him the ropes.

t_ch: 对了，我还没问过你，你想不想学呀？
t_en: Oh, I haven't asked you yet — are you interested in learning yourself?

t_ch: 我想学，快教我。
t_en: Sure, if it's easy to learn.

t_ch: 好呀好呀，我也有这个打算，你要是有空回来，我就可以教你啦。
t_en: Aha, I thought so. Come back when you have time — I'll teach you.

t_ch: 不是很想学呢…
t_en: Uhh... I'll pass.

t_ch: 哎呀，学会了之后，你和杨先生、三月七再找个人凑一桌，旅途上就不会无聊啦。
t_en: C'mon... If you learned how to play, then you, Welt, and March would only need to find one more person! You could get a table going and play a few rounds during your travels.

t_ch: 我们说好啦，你随时回来，我随时教你打牌。
t_en: We're in agreement then. You can come back any time and I'll teach you how to play.

t_ch: 我们说好啦，你随时回来，我随时教你打牌。
t_en: We're in agreement then. You can come back any time and I'll teach you how to play.

t_ch: 你好？
t_en: Hi?

t_ch: 在听先生说书吗？
t_en: Are you listening to Mr. Xiyan's stories?

t_ch: 对啊，自从我调来罗浮仙舟，风波不断。现在刚好有空闲时间，我就来这里听先生说书。
t_en: Sure am. Things have been in constant turmoil since I transferred to the Luofu. Now that I've got a little free time, I'm here to listen to some storytelling.

t_ch: 你是…对不住对不住，这阵子认识的人太多了，你瞧着有些眼生？看打扮，是化外民？
t_en: Are you... Sorry, I've met so many people recently, you seem unfamiliar... Judging by your clothes, you must be an outworlder?

t_ch: 我都听丹恒说了…
t_en: Dan Heng told me all about...

t_ch: 我是丹恒的朋友…
t_en: I'm Dan Heng's friend...

t_ch: 哦，原来如此！「闷葫芦」说来仙舟上与朋友汇合，那个朋友就是你吧？
t_en: Ahh, I see! Silent But Deadly told me something about meeting up with a friend. You must be them?

t_ch: 「闷葫芦」是说丹恒吗？
t_en: ...Silent But Deadly?

t_ch: 嗯，我也没说错吧。那家伙一路上心事重重的，让人可担心了。
t_en: Mm-hmm, pretty accurate nickname, right? That guy has a lot on his plate — it's enough to make you worry.

t_ch: 既然你出现在这里，说明事情都已经顺利解决了吧。
t_en: The fact you're standing here right now must mean things are pretty much taken care of?

t_ch: 我打算离开罗浮仙舟了。
t_en: I'm leaving the Luofu.

t_ch: 是这样啊，为了路上解闷，我推荐你听听西衍先生讲的云上五骁传奇。
t_en: Is that so? Well, before you leave, I recommend listening to Mr. Xiyan's Legend of the High-Cloud Quintet.

t_ch: 我从小就想成为顶天立地的大英雄，云上五骁的故事怎么听都听不厌，你肯定也会喜欢。
t_en: Ever since I was a little kid, I've always wanted to be an epic hero... I never get tired of hearing about the Quintet — I'm sure you'll love it.

t_ch: 下次你可要把丹恒先生也带来，咱们几个可以一起喝喝茶聊聊天。扯、扯远了，我不耽误你时间了，那祝你一路顺风。
t_en: You should bring Dan Heng along next time, we can chat over some tea. Anyway, I'm getting off-track, I won't take any more of your time. Good luck.

t_ch: 下次你可要把丹恒先生也带来，咱们几个可以一起喝喝茶聊聊天。
t_en: You should bring Dan Heng along next time, we can chat over some tea.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，要走了吗？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, are you off then?

t_ch: 我打算离开罗浮仙舟了。
t_en: I'm leaving the Luofu.

t_ch: 各位登上罗浮仙舟，是仙舟幸事。如今离开，我代表天舶司向各位送上祝福。
t_en: The Xianzhou Luofu is all the richer for your brief time with us. I offer blessings on behalf of the Sky-Faring Commission, on the eve of your departure.

t_ch: 如果旅途中有需要支应补充的物资，也请不要客气。
t_en: If you require resupplying during your journey, you can always count on us.

t_ch: 希望将来各位能有机会返回罗浮，浮生短促，我很希望能再见到你们。
t_en: Life is fleeting. We hope you'll have the opportunity to return to us on the Luofu soon.

t_ch: 哼哼，工造司经此一役也算受到了一番锤炼啊。只是这重建工作，真是累~煞~人~也！
t_en: The Artisanship Commission has come through hell and high water since the incident. Rebuilding what we lost will drain the years, our labor filled with blood, and sweat, and tears!

t_ch: 我打算离开罗浮仙舟了。
t_en: I'm leaving the Luofu.

t_ch: 没想到小娃儿你这么有心，专程来告诉老夫。
t_en: For a youngster to deliver a farewell to an old man like me is a rare occurrence in this day and age.

t_ch: 唉，我曾教过很多短生种的徒弟，他们离开罗浮后便再也不回来了，比起路途，时间才是真正阻绝一切的沟壑啊。
t_en: *sigh* I've taken on many a short-life apprentice — after leaving the Luofu, they never return. Time, not distance, is the true separator of souls.

t_ch: 这真是，余音袅袅虽不停～曲终人散终有时啊～
t_en: The lingering sound of bygone music plays, though groweth fainter with the parting ways.

t_ch: 你放心，我还会回来的。
t_en: Don't worry. I'll be back.

t_ch: 好啊，老夫就在这工造司，随时欢迎你回来。
t_en: I'm glad. I'll still be here at the Artisanship Commission. You're welcome any time.

t_ch: 听上去公输师傅很感伤。
t_en: You sound touched, Master Gongshu.

t_ch: 人生处处是别离，只不过，老夫经历得比你们多得多而已。
t_en: Life is full of farewells, and I've seen more than most.

t_ch: 唉，你们要走，老夫不唱曲儿了…心里闷得慌。
t_en: *sigh* But farewell it is. I shall not sing for you on your way out... I fear the sound would break my heartstrings...

t_ch: 唉，你们要走，老夫不唱曲儿了…心里闷得慌。
t_en: *sigh* But farewell it is. I shall not sing for you on your way out... I fear the sound would break my heartstrings...

t_ch: 汪汪！
t_en: Woof woof!

t_ch: 我打算离开罗浮仙舟了。
t_en: I'm leaving the Luofu.

t_ch: 呜~
t_en: *whimpers*

t_ch: 呜汪汪汪汪！汪汪！
t_en: Rrr—ruff ruff woof! Woof woof!

t_ch: 我…听不懂哎…
t_en: I... don't understand...

t_ch: 你说你会想我的？
t_en: What's that? You're gonna miss me?

t_ch: 汪汪！呜汪！
t_en: Woof woof! Rr—ruff!

t_ch: 这只谛听抬起前爪，圆滚滚的脑袋在空中画了个弧线，转了方向，向远处跑去。
t_en: Diting lifts its front paws, draws an arch in the air with its round head, turns around, and runs off into the distance.

t_ch: 它似乎在暗示着什么。
t_en: It looks like he has something to show you.

t_ch: 汪汪！
t_en: Woof woof!

t_ch: 这是…给我的礼物吗？！
t_en: Is this... a gift for me!?

t_ch: 汪~
t_en: Woof~

t_ch: 小狗绕了个圈，坐下，期待地想看你打开箱子，收获喜悦。
t_en: Diting circles around and sits down, expectantly wanting to see you open the chest and get something nice.

t_ch: 果然狗是人类最好的朋友。
t_en: I guess a dog really is a man's best friend after all.

t_ch: 谢谢你！
t_en: Thank you!

t_ch: 汪！
t_en: Woof!

t_ch: 汪！汪汪！
t_en: Woof! Woof woof!

t_ch: {F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，是你吗？
t_en: Is that you, {F#big sister}{M#big brother}?

t_ch: 听你的脚步声，我就知道你来啦。
t_en: I knew it was you by the sound of your footsteps.

t_ch: 是我，我打算离开罗浮了。
t_en: It's me. I'm planning on leaving the Luofu.

t_ch: 要走了吗？
t_en: You're leaving?

t_ch: 谢谢{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}和丹枢大人对我的帮助。你下一次回来，小鱼应该会长高不少，这样就用不着拖累大家了。
t_en: Thank you for helping me... and thanks to Dan Shu too. I should be taller the next time you're back, so I won't be such a burden on everyone.

t_ch: 对了，丹枢大人还好吗？有些和我一样的朋友都很关心她的近况…自从上次她为我们送完药，就再也没有音信呢。
t_en: By the way, is Dan Shu okay? Me and my friends are worried about her... We haven't heard from her since the last time she delivered the medicine.

t_ch: 她…在闭关研究丹药。
t_en: She's... on sabbatical studying medicinal pellets.

t_ch: 啊，小鱼明白了。炼制丹药一定是个很辛苦很辛苦的工作吧，咱们这些人可不能打扰到她。
t_en: Oh, I understand. Making pellets must be very hard work — we shouldn't bug her.

t_ch: 我长大了，也想成为丹枢大人那样了不得的丹士，为天缺者们炼药救治！
t_en: When I grow up, I want to be a great alchemist like Dan Shu — making medicine and helping the incomplete ones!

t_ch: 那么，{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}再见啦，旅途平安喔！
t_en: Well... bye-bye, {F#big sister}{M#big brother}. Have a safe journey!

t_ch: 她死了。
t_en: She's dead.

t_ch: 死…是什么意思？是指去很远很远的地方再也回不来了吗？就跟我的爸爸妈妈一样？
t_en: Dead... What does "dead" mean? Does it mean, going to a really really really far away place forever and ever, and never coming back? Like my mommy and daddy?

t_ch: 小鱼，你必须接受现实…
t_en: That's one way of putting it...

t_ch: …她犯下重罪，被就地正法。
t_en: She committed a serious crime... and was executed on the spot.

t_ch: 也就是说…丹枢大人再也不会来看我们了？
t_en: So... Dan Shu will never come to see us again?

t_ch: 小女孩一语不发，她没有光芒的白色瞳仁怔怔盯着你。
t_en: The little girl stares in your direction in silence, but the look in her eyes says a lot.

t_ch: {F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，谢谢你能告诉我这个消息。就像丹枢大人说的那样，我们不能指望别人永远照顾自己。
t_en: Thanks for telling me, {F#big sister}{M#big brother}. Like Dan Shu always said, we can't expect others to take care of us forever.

t_ch: 再见了，{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}。
t_en: Goodbye, {F#big sister}{M#big brother}.

t_ch: 再见，{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}。
t_en: Bye, {F#big sister}{M#big brother}.

t_ch: 哎…这以后可怎么办啊，不会真要改邪归正了吧？
t_en: *sigh* What do we do now? We don't really have to turn over a new leaf, do we?

t_ch: 那万万不能够啊，咱们这无非是假意顺从那些大人，日后找到机会再弃明投暗！
t_en: No way. We pretend to obey the grownups, then get back to business as soon as we get the chance!

t_ch: 喂，你看什么看，没看见哥儿几个正发愁呢吗？嗯…这化外民怎么看着那么眼熟啊？
t_en: Hey, what are you looking at? This is our conversation, okay? Hmm... Why does this outworlder seem so familiar to me?

t_ch: 老大，我认得{F#她}{M#他}！{F#她}{M#他}就是上次给咱们捣乱那货！
t_en: Hey boss, I recognize {F#her}{M#him}! {F#She's}{M#He's} the one who messed with us last time!

t_ch: 我也想起来了！我们上次和这人打完交道，一回家就吃了一顿拖鞋底！
t_en: I remember now! Last time we dealt with this one we got into big trouble!

t_ch: 原来是你啊！想来就是你把我们哥儿几个出卖给了黉学的先生吧？
t_en: Ah, it's you! You're the one who betrayed us, right?
